title: [codereview-1] Kconfig option naming and placement for CCP-16
description: Review pass 1 (correctness): New config LICHEN_CCP_LOAD_BALANCING should follow pattern LICHEN_LINK_CCP_LOAD_BALANCING or LICHEN_LINK_LOAD_BALANCE.
